title: Unauthorized visitor is blocked from the graduate dashboard
description: This verifies that an unauthenticated visitor cannot open the protected graduate dashboard and is redirected to sign in.

steps.description: Navigate to /graduate/dashboard
Verify the user is redirected to sign in
Verify the graduate dashboard is not displayed

title: Graduate can log in and access the dashboard
description: This verifies that a registered graduate can sign in successfully and reach the graduate dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the graduate dashboard is displayed

title: Employer can log in and access the dashboard
description: This verifies that a registered employer can sign in successfully and reach the employer dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /employers/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the employer dashboard is displayed

title: Graduate can register and reach the graduate area
description: This verifies that a new graduate can submit the registration form and end up in the graduate workspace or an equivalent post-registration confirmation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the registration name field with a new graduate name
Fill in the registration email field with a new unique email address
Fill in the registration password field with a valid password
Fill in the password confirmation field with the same valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify the graduate is taken to the authenticated graduate area or sees a registration confirmation state

title: Non-admin users are blocked from the admin dashboard
description: A non-admin signed-in user is prevented from accessing the admin dashboard and is redirected away from the protected page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Verify access to the admin dashboard is blocked
Verify the user is redirected to an allowed page

title: Employer can register and reach the employer area
description: This verifies that a new employer can submit the registration form and end up in the employer workspace or an equivalent post-registration confirmation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /employers/register
Fill in the registration name field with a new employer name
Fill in the registration email field with a new unique email address
Fill in the registration password field with a valid password
Fill in the password confirmation field with the same valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify the employer is taken to the authenticated employer area or sees a registration confirmation state

title: Admin can access the dashboard and review summary metrics
description: An administrator can sign in and view the admin dashboard summary metrics and management sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Verify admin summary metrics are displayed
Verify admin management sections are displayed

title: Graduate can access the dashboard after sign in
description: This verifies that a signed-in graduate can open the graduate dashboard and see the core overview and navigation actions.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to the graduate dashboard if needed
Verify the graduate overview is displayed
Verify graduate service actions are available

title: Employer creates a new job posting
description: An employer can sign in, create a job posting from the jobs area, and confirm the new listing appears in employer jobs.

steps.description: Navigate to /employers/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /employer/jobs
Open the job creation flow
Fill in the job title field with a valid job title
Fill in the job details field with valid job details
Submit the job posting
Verify the new job listing appears in the employer jobs area
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Employer creates a job posting and sees it listed
description: This verifies that an employer can create a job posting from job management and see the new posting in the jobs area.

steps.description: Navigate to /employers/login
Fill in the employer credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open job management
Create a new job posting with valid details
Save the job posting
Verify the new job posting is displayed in the jobs area
Verify the posting is available for further management

title: Graduate updates profile information
description: A graduate can view their profile, change personal information, save it, and see the updated profile reflected on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the profile page link
Edit personal information in the profile form
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated profile information is displayed
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Graduate registers for an event and sees it listed
description: This verifies that a graduate can browse events, register for one, and see the registration reflected in the events area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the graduate credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the events page
Select an available event to register for
Register for the selected event
Verify the registered event is displayed in the events area
Verify the registration state is shown for the event

title: Graduate requests an academic document
description: A graduate can submit a document request with a type and reason and then see the request recorded in the documents area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /graduate/documents
Open the document request flow
Fill in the document type field with a valid document type
Fill in the reason field with a valid request reason
Submit the document request
Verify the request is recorded in the documents area
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Graduate browses a job and applies successfully
description: A graduate can open a job listing, review its details, submit an application, and see the application action completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /graduate/jobs
Open a job listing
Review the job details
Submit the job application
Verify the application action is completed
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Employer updates an existing job posting
description: This verifies that an employer can open an existing posting, update its details, and see the updated posting in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /employers/login
Fill in the employer credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open job management
Select an existing job posting to manage
Update the job posting details
Save the changes
Verify the updated job posting is displayed in the jobs area
Verify the posting reflects the saved changes

title: Graduate registers for an event
description: A graduate can sign in, register for an event from the events page, and see the registration reflected in the events area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /graduate/events
Open an event listing
Register for the event
Verify the event registration is reflected in the events area
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Graduate can view available events
description: This verifies that a logged-in graduate can open the events page and view available events to register from.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the graduate credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the events page
Verify available events are displayed
Verify event registration actions are available

title: Graduate sees saved profile details after returning
description: A graduate can open their profile, make a change, save it, and later confirm the saved information remains visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the profile page link
Edit personal information in the profile form
Save the profile changes
Reload the profile page
Verify the saved profile information is still displayed

title: Administrator reviews dashboard metrics
description: This verifies that an administrator can access the dashboard and review portal summary metrics and management sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the administrator credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the admin dashboard
Verify dashboard summary metrics are displayed
Verify management sections are displayed

title: Public visitor can use document verification
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the verification page, enter details, and see a verification result state.

steps.description: Navigate to /verify
Fill in the verification details with valid document information
Submit the verification form
Verify a verification result is displayed

title: Graduate sees a validation error for invalid login details
description: This verifies that incorrect graduate credentials do not grant access and an invalid login message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a non-existent graduate email
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the sign-in form
Verify a login validation error is visible

title: Graduate can review available events without registering
description: A graduate can open the events page and browse available event listings before deciding to register.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /graduate/events
Verify event listings are displayed

title: Graduate can continue browsing after opening a job
description: A graduate can open a job listing from the jobs page and return to the listings to continue browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /graduate/jobs
Open a job listing
Return to the job listings
Verify the job listings are displayed

title: View latest jobs on the public home page
description: A public visitor can open the landing page and see the latest job opportunities highlighted there.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the landing page is displayed
Verify latest job opportunities are displayed

title: Graduate sees a validation error for incomplete registration
description: This verifies that submitting the graduate registration form with missing required information is blocked and a validation message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Submit the registration form without filling required fields
Verify a registration validation error is visible

title: Employer sees a validation error for incomplete registration
description: This verifies that submitting the employer registration form with missing required information is blocked and a validation message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /employers/register
Submit the registration form without filling required fields
Verify a registration validation error is visible

title: Public visitor verifies a document using public search
description: A public visitor can open the verification page, submit valid verification details, and see a verification result.

steps.description: Navigate to /verify
Fill in the verification details with valid information
Submit the verification search
Verify a verification result is displayed
Verify the document status is shown

title: Public visitor can browse the latest jobs from the landing page
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the public home page and see the latest jobs content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify latest jobs are displayed

title: Verify a public document successfully
description: A visitor can search public verification details and see a matching document verification result.

steps.description: Navigate to /verify
Fill in valid verification details into the search form
Submit the verification search
Verify a document verification result is displayed
Verify the result indicates the document is valid

title: Public visitor reviews latest jobs on the landing page
description: A public visitor can open the landing page and see the latest jobs section populated with job content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the latest jobs are displayed
Verify public landing content is displayed

title: Send a contact inquiry successfully
description: A public visitor can submit a contact inquiry from the alumni contact page and see a confirmation afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumni/contact
Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the message field with a valid inquiry
Submit the contact inquiry
Verify a success confirmation is displayed
Verify the inquiry form is no longer shown

title: Public visitor can send a contact inquiry
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the contact page, submit the form, and see a successful submission state.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumni/contact
Fill in the name field with a contact name
Fill in the email field with a contact email address
Fill in the message field with a contact inquiry
Submit the contact form
Verify a contact submission confirmation is visible

title: Public visitor accesses alumni information pages
description: A public visitor can navigate to the alumni about and contact pages and see both informational pages load successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to the alumni about page
Verify the alumni about content is displayed
Click the link to the alumni contact page
Verify the alumni contact form or contact information is displayed

title: Open a public job opportunity from the home page
description: A public visitor can use the landing page to open a job opportunity and reach the job detail view or related job listing area.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a public job opportunity from the latest jobs section
Verify the job opportunity page is displayed

title: Public visitor submits an alumni contact inquiry
description: A public visitor can send a contact inquiry from the alumni contact page and see confirmation that the inquiry was submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumni/contact
Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the message field with a valid message
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the contact inquiry is recorded or acknowledged

title: Employer sees validation when job details are incomplete
description: An employer leaving required job posting fields empty sees validation feedback and no job is created.

steps.description: Navigate to /employers/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /employer/jobs
Open the job creation flow
Submit the job posting
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify no new job listing is created

title: View the alumni information page
description: A public visitor can open the alumni information page and read the service overview content.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumni/about
Verify alumni information content is displayed

title: Public visitor can open the alumni about page
description: This verifies that a visitor can navigate to the public about page and see alumni information.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to the alumni about page
Verify alumni about information is displayed

title: Employer sees an empty job list when no postings exist
description: This verifies that the employer jobs area shows an empty state when there are no postings to manage.

steps.description: Navigate to /employers/login
Fill in the employer credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open job management
Verify an empty state message is displayed
Verify no job postings are listed

title: Graduate cannot submit an incomplete document request
description: A graduate leaving required document request fields empty sees validation feedback and the request is not created.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /graduate/documents
Open the document request flow
Submit the document request
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify no new document request is recorded

title: Public visitor sees validation when contact fields are missing
description: This verifies that the contact form rejects missing required fields and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumni/contact
Submit the contact form without filling required fields
Verify a contact form validation error is visible

title: Graduate sees an empty events state when none are available
description: This verifies that the events page shows an empty state when there are no available events to register for.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the graduate credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the events page
Verify an empty state message is displayed
Verify no event registration actions are available

title: Public visitor sees validation on incomplete contact inquiry
description: A public visitor leaving contact fields empty sees validation feedback and cannot submit the inquiry.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumni/contact
Submit the contact form
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the inquiry is not submitted

title: Handle an invalid public verification lookup
description: A visitor who enters invalid verification details sees a failed verification outcome instead of a valid document result.

steps.description: Navigate to /verify
Fill in invalid verification details into the search form
Submit the verification search
Verify a verification error or not-found message is displayed
Verify no valid document result is displayed

title: Show contact validation for missing required details
description: A public visitor who submits the contact form without required details sees validation feedback and no inquiry is sent.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumni/contact
Submit the contact inquiry without completing required fields
Verify validation errors are displayed
Verify the contact inquiry is not submitted
